title: Nefra Canyons
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the valleys on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]|[[Nefra]], the [[Sith alchemy/Legends|alchemically]]-modified [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[underwalker]]|linebreak=1}}
[[File:TIEcrashinginNefra.jpg|thumb|A TIE crashing on a cliff while pursuing the ''Moldy Crow''.]]
The '''Nefra Canyons''' were a formation on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]], part of a semiarid region near the [[Hanto Mountains]]. The [[Fuel City]] was built not far away, on the other side of the Mountains. The canyons were mazelike with reddish-brown corroded walls. Some ravines were so large that [[starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] could fly along.

During a mission in Fuel City in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], [[TIE/LN_starfighter|TIE]]s hunted the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]''. Sulonese native [[Kyle Katarn]] suggested to the [[pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Jan Ors]] to retreat to the Nefra Canyons to lose them. While flying over the mountains one TIE crashed, and led the remaining fighter dive and pursue her in a ravine. The pursuit passed turns and under a land bridge until reached a cliff; the ''Crow'' pulled over, but the TIE crashed on the cliff wall.<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>
